title: Aqylon Nexus Partners with DataDirect Networks India for AI-Ready Data Center Development
description: Aqylon Nexus has signed a one-year collaboration agreement with DataDirect Networks India to develop AI-ready data centers. The partnership specifically focuses on generative artificial intelligence and high-performance computing workloads, positioning both companies to address the growing demand for advanced computing infrastructure in the rapidly expanding AI sector.

title: China's new five-year plan calls for AI throughout its economy, tech breakthroughs
description: BEIJING: China's new five-year policy blueprint laid out its ambitions to aggressively adopt artificial intelligence throughout the world's second-biggest economy and dominate emerging technologies such as quantum computing and humanoid robots.

title: Teachers must adapt as AI and rapid change transform classrooms, OECD warns
description: An OECD report says education systems must rethink teaching as classrooms face rapid technological change, growing diversity and rising expectations beyond traditional academics. It stresses strengthening teacher autonomy, collaboration and mentoring while ensuring artificial intelligence supports learning without replacing the essential human role of teachers.
content: Education systems around the world are facing a major transformation as technology, changing societies and new job markets reshape how students learn. A recent report, Reimagining Teaching in an Accelerating World, prepared by the Organisation for Ec... [5289 chars]

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - China's Tech Ascendancy: AI and Quantum Computing to Dominate Future Landscape
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: Trump meets with tech companies
description: WASHINGTON -- President Donald Trump invited technology companies to the White House on Wednesday to commit to developing their own power generation as he tries to ease tensions over the cost of electricity used by data centers to develop artificial intelligence.
